description.s: Converts markdown description fields to Active Text. Handles headings, paragraphs, bold, italic, code, code blocks, lists, blockquotes,
Usage from REPL:   const lib = await api.require('markdown-to-doc-ast');   await lib.convertItem(api, 'item-id-here');
Create a copy (for side-by-side comparison):   await lib.convertItem(api, 'item-id-here', { copy: true });
Or to preview without saving:   const ast = lib.convert(markdownString);
